retry_reason: Failure is due to allocation or registration errors; retrying the same operation is generally pointless without changed conditions.

judge.reason: Primary purpose is MDIO bus allocation, initialization, and registration; refcount management via mdiobus_alloc/mdiobus_free is incidental, not the defining purpose.
